## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? How does it improve the developer experience?

## Examples
Provide some SP code showing how the proposed feature would work.
   ```sp
   // Example
   ```

## Implementation Ideas
If you have any ideas on how to implement this, feel free to share.
